Gnarled Staff  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +15 HP: +15 MANA: +45
SV COLD: +20 SV MAGIC: +25
WT: 0.6 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WIZ
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Gnarled Staff
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +15 HP: +15 MANA: +45
SV COLD: +20 SV MAGIC: +25
WT: 0.6 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WIZ
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:The power of Solusek Ro radiates from this item
Item Type:1H Blunt
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 05:45:56
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Karnor's Castle
NPC Name
The Fabled Venril Sathir
Venril Sathir

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Temple of Solusek Ro
Quest Name
Wizard Epic: Staff of the Four

Karnor's Castle

# Jun 27 2005 at 3:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592263037546
View User Forum
4 posts
can anyone confirm with me How to get the version you need for the wiz epic staff piece to spawn? Spawn timers/Turn-ins/which version you need to kill/Etc.

I'm told to kill real VS and I did that the other day and only got 2 stones and a bones drop.. from reading all the other posts it looks like he dropped the same things for them too.
▲ Page top
VS's Spawn Rate?
QuoteReply
# May 11 2005 at 10:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591840722220
3 posts
Can anyone tell me VS's REAL spawn rate? I must've asked 20 people, and everyone tells me something different. Some say 5 days, some say 4, some 3, some say only 12 hours after you kill VSR, some say 24 hours after VSR is killed. I've observed his spawn (though only for 5 days) and this is what I've seen.


Day 1: 1600 hours, VSR spawns
Day 2: 1600 hours, VSR still up
Day 3: 1600 hours, VSR still up
(note that I check every 5 hours to see if this is correct, but I'd rather not post a huge list of every time I checked.)
Day 3: 1900 hours, Venril Sathir (will the real VS please stand up?) is up and noone else in zone but my baby rogue spy.
Day 4: 0500 hours, VS is no longer there, suspect level 70 time geared plat seller who has his spawn timed
Day 5: 0800 hours, VSR is respawned

From this data I can conclude that VSR spawns 12-24 hours after VS is killed (this, I already knew and everyone agreed.) I can also conclude that VS will in fact spawn if VSR is up, he'll just despawn VSR when the real deal shows up. What I HAVEN'T been able to conclude is if there is a *set* spawn timer on VS for after VS is killed, and if killing VSR changes VS's spawn time at all.

Normally, I'd trust what someone told me about a mob's spawn rate, but this time I'm getting conflicting answers from EVERYONE, and I really need that gnarled staff for my epic >_< Beginning to think there's a conspiracy to hide his spawn rate so those who actually know it can loot the uber-l33t leggings which seem to fetch a nice price in the bazaar for a soloable mob ;)
▲ Page top
RE: VS's Spawn Rate?
QuoteReply
# May 29 2005 at 2:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591840722220
3 posts
Caught him up a while ago. Simply leveled up a vah shir rogue to 5 (for sneak/hide+safe fall) and brought it to VS's room. Checked in every few hours, and about 34 hours after after the above post he was up. First tried to see if a level 70 time geared necro buddy of mine could solo it, but only got it to about 65% before pet was dead and he had to FD. Then decided to overkill it, by using 2 70 Necro, 1 70 Druid, 1 68 Cleric and me (53 Wiz at the time.) Druid tanked through the whole fight and never dropped below 80% health. Necro pets did some good DPS and the cleric barely had to cast anything at all ;) Once VS was at about 70% I unloaded my entire mana bar on him casting lures and he dropped extremely fast, though everyone else had some trouble getting their spells to stick on him. Walked away with my gnarled staff, the +15int gloves (because noone else wanted them) and one of the necros walked away with the pally greaves. Couple weeks later after killing Phinny 4 times, and then leading a full group of 65+ to PoFear I now wield my Staff of the Four :) Fun quest, and WELL worth the clicky effect of a free 800hp rune, and +3 mana regen :) And the stats aren't bad either ;)

12 posts
Well I really lucked out today, iv already done the quest up to the staves so im leveling and working on guildraids alot. Well i was attempting to find a group in KC when a single group of Endorian guildies showed up to take down VS... which they did in short order. Took them about 10-15 min to work their way to VS and take him out. Luckily they didnt have any wizzies w/ them and offered to let me loot the staff. Thanks Endorian

▲ Page top
3 drops
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2002 at 3:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759767418
8 posts
My guild has done Phinny many times, but the difference is that we've had very good luck. We did it once, and it dropped for our highest wizzy. They killed him for other epics, and soon had another drop, but no wizzies with them so it will be multiquested when another wizzy is ready to finish their epic. Within a week, another dropped for us, but again no wizzies around. Luckily enough however, we have 3 51+ wizzies and 3 staffs. It is just getting the other 2 staffs for us that we need to work on, but I am in no rush for my own. We have done alot of epics lately and taking a break for a few weeks to exp more. Good luck on your epics!
▲ Page top
RE: 3 drops
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2003 at 5:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253751719
87 posts
I think the MQ'able Wiz epic is an "EQ Urban Legend."

Would you mind explaining how you're going to MQ the staffs? Arantor (in Halas) gives you a sealed box that you (the wiz) must place all 3 staffs to give to Solomon for your wiz epic.

The wizard needs the staffs, and you can't MQ them to another player. You have to have the 3 staffs in the box to give to Solomon, otherwise you get nada, and waste a lot of camping time.

Perhaps at one time this was MQ'able. It's not anymore to my knowledge.

All you have probably done is deprive a Wizard from getting the staff when you loot it. There may not be another wiz in Kedge if Phinny drops it. There will almost always be one in KC. If the wiz staffs drop, don't loot it. Find a Wiz to loot it instead.
▲ Page top
RE: 3 drops
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2003 at 12:16 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592256412506
27 posts
Apparently you haven't done much research on this topic Callawayn, otherwise you would realize that you have no idea what you're talking about.

"Would you mind explaining how you're going to MQ the staffs? Arantor (in Halas) gives you a sealed box that you (the wiz) must place all 3 staffs to give to Solomon for your wiz epic.

The wizard needs the staffs, and you can't MQ them to another player."

This quest is absolutely MQ'able. Arantir Karondor does not give you a sealed box to combine the staves in. Here is what he says when you give him the note from Kandin:

"Arantir Karondor says 'Ah yes, you again. Do you have the items? Give me the three you possess and I'll combine them with my own."

Now since Ladanea previously posted that character X looted the Phinny staff, we'll assume wizard Y has the VS and Golem staves already. X turns in Phinny staff to Arantir. After that is done, Y turns in the remaining 2 staves into Arantir, and like ALL other MQs, the last person that turns in an item gets the reward, therefore wizard Y receives the sealed pack that you then turn into Solomen.

Issue resolved. Ladanea is right and we both know what we are talking about, you are wrong and do not. Maybe you were mixing up information from another quest such as the Staff of the Wheel with this one. Maybe you believed heresy misinformation and took it for truth. Maybe you're a druid. Regardless of what you believed it doesn't matter. Don't flame another person's post unless you damn well understand the subject matter inside-out, otherwise somebody comes along and proves you wrong and you wind up looking stupid.

Edited, Fri Feb 14 00:06:21 2003
▲ Page top
Phinney
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2002 at 1:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245905595
343 posts
He is actually pretty easy once you get used to the method of how to kill him. Just got my Blue Crystal Staff last night after my 6th kill. Once I turn these staffs in, I have full intent on getting all three staffs over again for thier resists. Very nice items.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 30 2001 at 9:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Take a good look at all the staffs from the quest. They ALL have better resists than the epic. Personally, I am gonna get my epic, use it for my shield, then wear which ever staff fits my resist needs.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 16 2001 at 9:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This staff is cool! One time me and my friend Freddy got lost, then he got hit by a bus. His body was almost as gnarled as this staff! But he is quiet now, and always sleeping. My mom says the bone sticking out of his leg is completely normal, but, i think she is trying to trick me! She also says that the fact thnat his ear is twice the size of his head is a good sign. What should i do?

# Mar 20 2003 at 5:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591783238992
166 posts
I am told and have found that the staff drops 1 in 4 kills now. I was keeping track of the kills about 5 months ago and many have said they upped the drop rate on a patch so I checked and it is indeed higher now. Now it's not even that uncommon for the staff to drop multiple times in a row but it would still be rare. All I can say is it's about time, for something as over camped as Phinny sometimes is by the damn insomniac uber guilds it's nice to give the common wizard a greater chance to get it on 1 kill.

Liveye (lvl 60 Wizard)

PS- Also it is more likey it will follow the 1 in 4 drop ratio though than twice in a row. :p

▲ Page top
RE: No Dmg / Delay
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2005 at 2:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759389789
View User Forum
45 posts
Its odd how different people have such different opinions on this epic. I got the golem in fear the day after I decided to start my epic, I zoned in to find that a guild had cleared PoFear 90% of zone was dead. The BG happened to be up and not another single mob near him anywhere. I sat in Pofear bout an hour asking around for help to kill him, when a random group zones in that is going after the enchanter piece. they help me kill the golem. Then I run straight from Fear to kedge, no phinny, so I run my 70 sk over so I can 2 box him and be ready when he does spawn. I camped both characters there and went to run some errands, signed back on about 2 hours later and BAM, phinny is up. Pull him and kill him with the sk, and staff dropped on my first kill. My problem now is VS (that alot of people on here say is the easy part). Its really tough to catch him up, and even if I did, I could not duo him. I tried about 2 weeks ago before I even started my epic, and the sk went to a 20 minute stalemate with him. He could not kill the sk with infusion up, I resisted every lifetap, and his hits are gimp, but with his regen I could not get him below 90%. So I guess I am now looking to buy a MQ of the VS staff on Tunare server.
▲ Page top
